body:
### Problem

When `vim.lsp.util.show_document` is called while in insert mode and the target character position is at or past the end of line, the cursor is clamped to the last character instead of being placed at the append position (one past the last char).

This happens because `nvim_win_set_cursor` clamps the column to the last character of the line, but in insert mode the valid cursor range includes one position past EOL.


This was originally found with the JetBrains kotlin-lsp. After accepting a completion, the server sends a `window/showDocument` request with `selection` pointing one past the end of the inserted word. The cursor lands in front the last character instead of after it.


### Steps to reproduce using "nvim --clean -u minimal_init.lua"

```lua
-- Jump to the character 5 of the current line using vim.lsp.util.show_document
local function jump_to_char_5()
  local bufnr = vim.api.nvim_get_current_buf()
  local cursor = vim.api.nvim_win_get_cursor(0) -- {row, col}, 1-indexed row
  local line = cursor[1] - 1 -- convert to 0-indexed

  local uri = vim.uri_from_bufnr(bufnr)
  local location = {
    uri = uri,
    range = {
      start = { line = line, character = 5 },
      ['end'] = { line = line, character = 5 },
    },
  }

  vim.lsp.util.show_document(location, 'utf-8', { focus = true })
end

vim.keymap.set('i', '<C-h>', jump_to_char_5)
``` 


Create `input.txt`:
```
first
second
```

## Reproduction steps

1. Open `input.txt` and position the cursor at the beginning of line 1 (`first` - 5 chars)
2. Enter insert mode (`i`)
3. Press `<C-h>` to call `show_document` targeting `character = 5` (past EOL of `first`)


### Expected behavior

**Expected:** `col = 6` in insert mode (append position, after last char of `first`). After exiting insert mode it should be `col = 5`
**Actual:** `col = 5` in insert mode (in front of last char). After exiting insert mode it is `col = 4`

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

0.11.0

### Language server name/version

kotlin-lsp v262.1817.0

### Operating system/version

PopOs 22.04

### Log file

_No response_
title: LSP: show_document can't position cursor past EOL in insert mode
